privileged_info_for_vlm: The built-in 'Seatbelts' dataset contains 192 monthly observations. The intervention (Feb 1983) occurs at observation index 170. IMPORTANT: The task asks for an analysis on 'DriversKilled'. A correct analysis on 'DriversKilled' will yield a level change estimate (law coefficient) of approximately -19 to -23. Do not penalize the agent if this value appears in the diagnostics CSV; it is the correct mathematical result for 'DriversKilled', whereas a drop of ~300 would incorrectly correspond to total driver casualties. The expected output directory is '/home/ga/RProjects/output' and the script path is '/home/ga/RProjects/its_seatbelt_analysis.R'.
